{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = The Greatfather
| introduced = Bloodline
}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[The Greatfather]] is a mountain to the south.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c9">''Bloodline'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
